reference: My wife had a left knee total replacement on Monday, was released home on Thursday, and has done well. She is on oxycodone as needed for pain. On Friday night, we experienced severe night sweats. Otherwise, there are no other symptoms. Could this be just recovering from the anesthesia, or what other causes could lead to this? She only had these night sweats for one night.
text: My wife had a left knee total replacement on Monday, was released home on Thursday, and has done well. She is on oxycodone as needed for pain.
